description: Authoritative registry of APEX modules. Contains the eight spec-named modules from apex-spec.md (apex-core, apex-frontend, apex-data, apex-security, apex-test-architect, apex-fintech, apex-healthcare, apex-builder). Two additional migrated modules (apex-integration, apex-memory-synthesis) exist under framework/modules/ and are delivered by sync-to-claude.sh's manifest-driven traversal even though they are not part of the spec's canonical eight; they are listed in `additional_modules` below for discoverability. Module ecosystem interpretation contract is documented in framework/docs/MODULE-ECOSYSTEM.md (R6-002). Manifest-driven directories satisfy the spec's structural commitments (independent lifecycle, versioning, dispatcher resolution, hook contribution); separate-repo / git-submodule isolation is a future migration path with named trigger conditions. Stub modules (status='stub') are canonical placeholders for spec-named domains; they advertise structure only and intentionally ship without agent.md. Modules with status='stub' are canonical placeholders for spec-named domains; lint honors stub status and does not require agent.md (R6-005 fast-path in framework/hooks/agent-lint.sh — stub modules with agent_path=null exit lint with a stub-acknowledged stderr message; active modules continue to require agent.md).

additional_modules.name: apex-integration
additional_modules.rationale: Pre-existing specialist (integration-specialist) not in the spec's canonical eight but required by the existing dispatcher contract; migrated into the module ecosystem in R5-001 to keep the layout uniform.

additional_modules.name: apex-memory-synthesis
additional_modules.rationale: Pre-existing specialist (memory-synthesis dream-cycle agent) not in the spec's canonical eight but required by the existing dispatcher contract; migrated into the module ecosystem in R5-001 to keep the layout uniform.
